summary: The notebook currently holds a foundational ML course note on gradient descent and a reading note on the Transformer architecture.

areas.label: Machine Learning
areas.coverage: One course note covers gradient descent: the update rule, a quadratic worked example, and learning-rate failure modes.
areas.gap: The ml-foundations course has only its first note; broader optimization and foundational topics are not yet covered.

areas.label: Deep Learning
areas.coverage: A structured reading note explains self-attention, multi-head attention, and Transformer translation results.
areas.gap: No notes yet on newer Transformer variants, sub-quadratic attention, or downstream efficiency improvements.
